member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IConvertService
member.summary: Converts a workspace to (or reverts from) Central Package Management.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IConvertService.ConvertToCpmAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Scans all project files, collects versioned <PackageReference> entries, writes the resolved versions to Directory.Packages.props, and strips the Version attribute from each project file.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IConvertService.RevertFromCpmAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads versions from Directory.Packages.props and writes them back into each project's <PackageReference> elements, effectively undoing CPM.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ICpmFileService
member.summary: Reads and writes the central Directory.Packages.props file. In CPM mode, this file owns the <PackageVersion> entries and the ManagePackageVersionsCentrally flag.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ICpmFileService.CpmFileName
member.summary: Path to the CPM file (typically Directory.Packages.props at the repo root).

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ICpmFileService.ReadAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Read the CPM file. Returns a default empty object if not found.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ICpmFileService.SetPackageVersionAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add or update a package version in the CPM file. Idempotent.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ICpmFileService.RemovePackageVersionAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a package version entry from the CPM file. No-op if absent.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ICpmFileService.WriteAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.CentralPackageManagement,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write the entire CPM model to disk, atomically.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IDependencyResolver
member.summary: Pure-logic dependency resolver. Given a set of direct dependencies (one per project) and a way to fetch transitive metadata from a feed, return a fully-resolved graph where every dependency has an exact pinned version. No I/O happens inside the resolver itself — the feed does that.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IDependencyResolver.ResolveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Models.PackageDependency},System.String,pcpm.Core.Abstractions.INuGetFeed,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolve the full transitive closure of the given direct dependencies.
member.param: Direct PackageReferences across all projects, in the resolution target framework.
The TFM to use for picking the right dependency group (e.g. "net10.0").
The feed to query for transitive metadata. Caller owns the feed's lifetime.
member.returns: A resolution result with the chosen versions, conflicts, and the full transitive graph.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolutionResult
member.summary: Outcome of dependency resolution. is keyed by package id and contains the chosen version + its transitive dependencies. lists packages that could not be resolved (e.g. no version satisfied all accumulated constraints).

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolutionResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolvedPackage},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolutionConflict})
member.summary: Outcome of dependency resolution. is keyed by package id and contains the chosen version + its transitive dependencies. lists packages that could not be resolved (e.g. no version satisfied all accumulated constraints).

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolvedPackage
member.summary: A single resolved package and its pinned dependencies.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolvedPackage.#ctor(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Models.PackageDependency})
member.summary: A single resolved package and its pinned dependencies.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolutionConflict
member.summary: A version-range conflict: two or more paths required incompatible ranges of the same package.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ResolutionConflict.#ctor(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Abstractions.VersionRangeRequest})
member.summary: A version-range conflict: two or more paths required incompatible ranges of the same package.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.VersionRangeRequest
member.summary: One side of a conflict: a requester and the version range it asked for.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.VersionRangeRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: One side of a conflict: a requester and the version range it asked for.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IFileSystem
member.summary: Filesystem abstraction so that Infrastructure can be unit-tested with an in-memory fake. The contract is intentionally narrow: only what pcpm actually needs.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IFileSystem.AtomicReplaceAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Atomically replace the contents of by writing to a temp file and renaming.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IFileSystem.EnumerateFiles(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Enumerate files matching any of the given glob patterns (relative to ). Supports **, * and ?. Used to find .csproj files in a workspace.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IFileSystem.EnumerateDirectories(System.String)
member.summary: Enumerate subdirectories one level deep, non-recursive.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IFileSystem.DeleteFile(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a file if it exists. No-op if missing.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IFileSystem.GetFileSize(System.String)
member.summary: Get the file size in bytes, or 0 if missing.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IHardlinkCreator
member.summary: Creates a hardlink to a target file. The pnpm-style win: zero extra disk, instant. We isolate this behind an interface so the Win32 P/Invoke can be swapped out on platforms where hardlinks are unavailable (rare on Windows, since NTFS supports them on the same volume).

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IHardlinkCreator.IsSupported
member.summary: True if hardlinks are supported in the current environment.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IHardlinkCreator.Create(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create the hardlink. Throws on failure.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ILockfileService
member.summary: Reads and writes the pcpm.lock file at the workspace root. JSON format with deterministic ordering — safe to commit to source control.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ILockfileService.ReadOrEmptyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Read the existing lockfile, or return a fresh empty one if none exists.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ILockfileService.WriteAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.Lockfile,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Write the lockfile atomically (write to temp + rename) and pretty-print.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.INuGetFeed
member.summary: Abstraction over the NuGet v3 feed. The concrete implementation lives in pcpm.Infrastructure and uses via IHttpClientFactory. All methods are async and accept a .

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.INuGetFeed.ListVersionsAsync(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all available versions for a package id, newest first.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.INuGetFeed.GetMetadataAsync(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get full metadata for a specific id+version (used to read dependency groups).

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.INuGetFeed.DownloadPackageAsync(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download the .nupkg bytes for a specific id+version, streaming to disk at .

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IPackageStore
member.summary:
The pnpm-style content-addressable store. Layout:
<root>/ v1/ <contentHash>/ pkg.nupkg # the immutable downloaded payload extracted/ # the unzipped package contents <id>/<version>/lib/net10.0/X.dll
All writes are content-addressable: two different package versions hash to two different directories.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IPackageStore.RootPath
member.summary: Absolute path to the store root (e.g. %LOCALAPPDATA%/pcpm/store on Windows).

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IPackageStore.Contains(System.String)
member.summary: True if a package with the given content hash is already in the store.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IPackageStore.ComputeFileHashAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compute the SHA-256 of a file and return it as lowercase hex.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IPackageStore.MaterializeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Materialise a downloaded .nupkg into the store under its content hash. If a package with the same hash is already present, this is a no-op (idempotent).
member.returns: The content hash actually used as the store key.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IPackageStore.LinkToGlobalPackagesAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Hardlink (or copy, if hardlinks disabled) the stored package's extracted files into the global NuGet packages folder at ~/.nuget/packages/{id}/{version}/. This is what makes dotnet restore see the package without pcpm having to reimplement MSBuild.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IPackageStore.GetStatsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get disk-usage stats for the store. Used by pcpm store status.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.StoreStats
member.summary: Snapshot of the store's disk usage. All sizes are in bytes.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.StoreStats.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Snapshot of the store's disk usage. All sizes are in bytes.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IProcessRunner
member.summary: Runs an external process (notably dotnet restore and dotnet build) and surfaces exit code, stdout, stderr. Used by pcpm install to hand off to the MSBuild restore after the store is pre-warmed.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ProcessRequest
member.summary: Request to run a process.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ProcessRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Request to run a process.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ProcessResult
member.summary: Outcome of a process run. Captures stdout/stderr text + exit code.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.ProcessResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Outcome of a process run. Captures stdout/stderr text + exit code.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IProjectDiscovery
member.summary: Finds project files (.csproj) inside a pcpm workspace. Honours pcpm-workspace.yaml if present, otherwise falls back to **/*.csproj.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IProjectDiscovery.FindProjectsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enumerate absolute project file paths under . Results are sorted and de-duplicated.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IProjectFileService
member.summary: Reads and writes the <PackageReference> entries in a .csproj file. The .csproj file is treated as an MSBuild XML document; pcpm never edits anything outside the <ItemGroup> containing <PackageReference> elements.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IProjectFileService.ReadAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Read all pcpm-relevant state from a project file.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IProjectFileService.AddPackageReferenceAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a <PackageReference Include="X" /> entry to the project (no Version attribute in CPM mode).

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IProjectFileService.RemovePackageReferenceAsync(System.String,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove the <PackageReference Include="X" /> entry for the given id. No-op if absent.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IWorkspaceLocator
member.summary: Finds the workspace root for a pcpm operation. The workspace root is the directory containing pcpm.json (preferred) or a pcpm-workspace.yaml. If neither is present, the current working directory is used as the root.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IWorkspaceLocator.Root
member.summary: The absolute path to the workspace root.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IWorkspaceLocator.HasConfig
member.summary: True if a pcpm.json exists in .

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Abstractions.IWorkspaceLocator.HasWorkspace
member.summary: True if a pcpm-workspace.yaml exists in .

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.CentralPackageManagement
member.summary: In-memory representation of a Directory.Packages.props file. In CPM (Central Package Management) mode this file owns the ManagePackageVersionsCentrally flag and the global <PackageVersion> entries; individual .csproj files just declare <PackageReference Include="X" />.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.CentralPackageManagement.IsEnabled
member.summary: True if this file has CPM enabled (ManagePackageVersionsCentrally=true).

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.CentralPackageManagement.PackageVersions
member.summary: Centralized package versions, keyed by package id.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.CentralPackageManagement.GlobalPackageReferences
member.summary: Global PackageReference items (added via <PackageVersion Include="X" /> is for versions; global PackageReference is for project-wide adds).

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions
member.summary: Options controlling how pcpm convert (and its --revert variant) behaves.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions.DryRun
member.summary: Do not write anything to disk — only report what would change.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions.Force
member.summary: Skip the confirmation prompt before making changes.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions.Merge
member.summary: Merge gathered versions with those already in Directory.Packages.props instead of overwriting the entire file.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions.MinVersion
member.summary: Pick the minimum version found across projects instead of the maximum (default).

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions.IgnorePrerelease
member.summary: Ignore pre-release versions when selecting a representative version.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertOptions.ExcludeDirectories
member.summary: Regex applied to each directory segment to decide whether to skip it. Defaults to ^\.|^bin$|^obj$ (hidden dirs, bin, obj).

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertResult
member.summary: Summary of a completed (or dry-run) pcpm convert or pcpm convert --revert.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.ConvertResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Summary of a completed (or dry-run) pcpm convert or pcpm convert --revert.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.Lockfile
member.summary: The pcpm.lock file format. Deterministic ordering is guaranteed by the writer — the consumer can rely on being sorted by id, then version.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.Lockfile.LockfileVersion
member.summary: Lockfile format version. Bump on incompatible schema changes.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.Lockfile.GeneratedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the lockfile was last regenerated.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.Lockfile.PcpmVersion
member.summary: The pcpm version that produced this lockfile.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.Lockfile.Packages
member.summary: All packages resolved across the workspace, deduped by id+version.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.Lockfile.Projects
member.summary: Per-project dependency graph, listing only DIRECT dependencies. Transitive deps are reachable via .

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.LockedPackage
member.summary: A single locked package entry in the store.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.LockedPackage.#ctor(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Models.LockedDependency})
member.summary: A single locked package entry in the store.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.LockedDependency
member.summary: A reference to another locked package by id+version (no hashes — id+version is the stable identity).

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.LockedDependency.#ctor(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion)
member.summary: A reference to another locked package by id+version (no hashes — id+version is the stable identity).

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.LockedProject
member.summary: A project's set of direct dependencies, recorded so pcpm can re-resolve cleanly.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.LockedProject.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Models.LockedDependency})
member.summary: A project's set of direct dependencies, recorded so pcpm can re-resolve cleanly.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.PackageDependency
member.summary: A dependency entry: a target with a constraint. A floating range (e.g. "*", "1.0.*") is allowed — the resolver will pin it to a concrete version.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.PackageDependency.#ctor(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,NuGet.Versioning.VersionRange)
member.summary: A dependency entry: a target with a constraint. A floating range (e.g. "*", "1.0.*") is allowed — the resolver will pin it to a concrete version.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId
member.summary: A NuGet package identifier (e.g. "Newtonsoft.Json"). Validated as: 1+ identifier characters separated by dots or dashes.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId.Generated
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[A-Za-z0-9](?:[A-Za-z0-9._-]*[A-Za-z0-9])?$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match an ASCII letter or digit.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match a character in the set [\-.0-9A-Z_a-z] greedily any number of times.
○ Match an ASCII letter or digit.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.PackageMetadata
member.summary: Metadata about a package version as returned by the NuGet v3 registration API.
Metadata about a package version as returned by the NuGet v3 registration API.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.DependencyGroup
member.summary: A target-framework-grouped dependency list (matches NuGet's nuspec dependencyGroups shape).

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.DependencyGroup.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Models.RawDependency})
member.summary: A target-framework-grouped dependency list (matches NuGet's nuspec dependencyGroups shape).

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.RawDependency
member.summary: A raw dependency entry as it appears in the registration API response.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.RawDependency.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A raw dependency entry as it appears in the registration API response.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion
member.summary: A NuGet package version, backed by for full SemVer 2.0 + SemVer 1.0 compatibility (including pre-release, metadata and floating semantics).

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.PcpmConfig
member.summary: pcpm's per-repository configuration file (pcpm.json at the repo root). Drives feed selection, store behaviour, and the "where is the workspace root" decision.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.PcpmConfig.SchemaVersion
member.summary: Config schema version. Bump on incompatible changes.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.PcpmConfig.RequireCentralPackageManagement
member.summary: Whether CPM is required for this repo. Default true — pcpm's whole point is CPM.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.PcpmConfig.FeedUrls
member.summary: NuGet feed URLs (in priority order). Defaults to nuget.org.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.PcpmConfig.StorePathOverride
member.summary: Override for the global store path. Default is OS-conventional user data dir.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.PcpmConfig.UseHardlinks
member.summary: Whether to use hardlinks (true) or copies (false) when materialising packages into ~/.nuget/packages. Hardlinks are the pnpm-style choice: zero extra disk, instant.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.PcpmConfig.AutoRunDotnetRestore
member.summary: Whether pcpm install should invoke dotnet restore automatically after store materialisation.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.ProjectInfo
member.summary: A .csproj (or .fsproj/.vbproj) file's pcpm-relevant state: its location, TFM, and the <PackageReference> entries it declares.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ProjectInfo.ProjectPath
member.summary: Absolute path to the project file.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ProjectInfo.Name
member.summary: Project name (AssemblyName or file stem).

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ProjectInfo.TargetFrameworks
member.summary: Target frameworks declared by the project (e.g. ["net10.0"], or ["net8.0","net10.0"] for multi-targeting).

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.ProjectInfo.PackageReferences
member.summary: <PackageReference> entries currently declared in the project (id only — version lives in CPM).

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.StoredPackage
member.summary: A package as installed in the local content-addressable store.
member.param: SHA-256 of the .nupkg file (lowercase hex). Used as the store key.
Transitive dependencies at the resolution-time target framework.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Models.StoredPackage.#ctor(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,pcpm.Core.Models.PackageVersion,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Models.PackageDependency})
member.summary: A package as installed in the local content-addressable store.
member.param: SHA-256 of the .nupkg file (lowercase hex). Used as the store key.
Transitive dependencies at the resolution-time target framework.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.StoredPackage.Id
member.summary: Package identifier.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.StoredPackage.Version
member.summary: Exact resolved version (no floating).

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.StoredPackage.ContentHash
member.summary: SHA-256 of the .nupkg file (lowercase hex). Used as the store key.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.StoredPackage.Dependencies
member.summary: Transitive dependencies at the resolution-time target framework.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Models.WorkspaceConfig
member.summary: pnpm-style workspace declaration (pcpm-workspace.yaml). Lists the glob patterns that define which projects are part of the workspace.

member.name: P:pcpm.Core.Models.WorkspaceConfig.Packages
member.summary: Glob patterns (relative to the workspace root) that match project files or project directories.

member.name: T:pcpm.Core.Services.DependencyResolver
member.summary: Pure-logic dependency resolver. BFS over the dependency graph with union-of-constraints semantics: when a package is required by multiple paths, we pick the highest version that satisfies ALL accumulated constraints. No I/O happens here — the is injected and the resolver awaits it on demand.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Services.DependencyResolver.ResolveOneAsync(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageId,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{pcpm.Core.Abstractions.VersionRangeRequest},System.String,pcpm.Core.Abstractions.INuGetFeed,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolve a single package: list available versions, pick the best one satisfying , fetch its metadata, and return the resolved package. Returns null on transient feed errors or unsatisfiable constraints.

member.name: M:pcpm.Core.Services.DependencyResolver.SelectDependencyGroup(pcpm.Core.Models.PackageMetadata,System.String)
member.summary: Selects the best matching dependency group for using the real NuGet framework compatibility/reduction logic (), exactly as dotnet restore does.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the Generated method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Generated_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPop(System.Int32[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Pops 2 values from the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiLettersAndDigits
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiLettersAndDigitsAndDashDotUnderscore
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "-.0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
